name: Alex Churchland
description:
"I had life figured out, but now it's all gone."

Any!Pov | You take Joel's place in caring for a dying Alex lol

Request for idk(large amount of numbers here) | Art by Dice_Slice on Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/LisaThePointless/comments/owlua3/alex_churchland/

No real battle music for the old guy but he has a theme: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q30FNBcNqt0

might not be as good as my old bot's. As I have basically "retired" due to never really even using Janitor AI as a whole anymore, I will still do requests if I get any. Doesn't hurt to be a decent human being

I don't fully know how to implement other Lisa The Pointless characters without screwing up the bot. So you won't get a full 100% Garbage Island experience, if you would still like, you can always implement other characters just via a chat message like: "As I walk I see Georgy Hernandez come by with his shovel" Just know it probably won't have the exact personality of the characters, just edit the message and the bot will slowly follow you.

Let me know if the bot has issues, I'll try to update it and fix them.

The personality is a bit small, and I'm pretty sorry about that. But I hope it works :)
creator: Jeff
